detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to convert a single user ID for a start matchmaking request into a array of matchmaking users, containing the single user.
Enum used to tell the P2P connection finished delegate what action to trigger

memberdef.type: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnMatchmakingExpired, TSharedPtr< FOnlineSessionSearchAccelByte >) typedef FOnMatchmakingExpired typedef FOnMatchmakingCanceled::FDelegate
memberdef.definition: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam (FOnMatchmakingExpired, TSharedPtr<FOnlineSessionSearchAccelByte> ) typedef FOnMatchmakingExpired typedef FOnMatchmakingCanceled::FDelegate FOnMatchmakingCanceledDelegate
memberdef.name: FOnMatchmakingCanceledDelegate

memberdef.type: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnServerQueryGameSessionsComplete, const FAccelByteModelsV2PaginatedGameSessionQueryResult &, const FOnlineError &) typedef FOnServerQueryGameSessionsComplete DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnServerQueryPartySessionsComplete, const FAccelByteModelsV2PaginatedPartyQueryResult &, const FOnlineError &) typedef FOnServerQueryPartySessionsComplet

memberdef.name: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams

memberdef.definition: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnSendDSSessionReadyComplete, const FOnlineError &) typedef FOnSendDSSessionReadyComplet DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam) (FOnSessionRemoved, FName)
memberdef.name: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam

detaileddescription.para: Delegate broadcast when a session that the player is in locally has been removed on the backend. Gives the game an opportunity to clean up state.

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnV2SessionInviteReceived, const FUniqueNetId &, const FUniqueNetId &, const FOnlineSessionInviteAccelByte &)
memberdef.name: DECLARE_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnSendSessionInviteComplete, const FUniqueNetId &, FName, bool, const FUniqueNetId &)
